Thought 4: Since Ronald was not at the mosque and has no direct link to the crime scene, he lacks the opportunity to administer the venom to Kent during the time of the murder. Julia, on the other hand, was with Kent at the mosque on the day of the murder, had an altercation with him, and has both the means (herpetologist with access to venom) and a strong financial motive (inheritance dispute). Ronald's suspicious behavior is related to past misdemeanors and fleeing from the detective, but it doesn't directly connect him to the murder. Therefore, Julia is the most likely murderer.
